fields.title: Digital Health Interventions for Health Systems
fields.summary: WHO overview of digital technologies that strengthen healthcare systems and improve service delivery.
fields.description: An official World Health Organization educational presentation introducing digital health interventions, electronic health records, telemedicine, mobile health and evidence-based implementation strategies for healthcare systems.

fields.title: Infection Prevention and Control Essentials
fields.summary: CDC educational video covering infection prevention best practices in healthcare facilities.
fields.description: Official educational content introducing standard precautions, transmission-based precautions, hand hygiene and infection prevention practices for healthcare professionals.
fields.presenter: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention

fields.title: Universal Health Coverage Explained
fields.summary: WHO educational video explaining Universal Health Coverage and resilient health systems.
fields.description: A concise introduction to Universal Health Coverage, primary healthcare, financing models and health system resilience from the World Health Organization.

fields.title: Child Health and Nutrition
fields.summary: UNICEF educational resource on improving child survival and nutrition outcomes.
fields.description: Educational content discussing maternal and child health, nutrition, immunization and early childhood development through evidence-based global interventions.
